channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Texas floods kill at least one and rescue over 70 as deadly flood wave surges
item.description: Texas is facing severe flooding after days of relentless rain, with at least one fatality reported and over 70 people rescued. Governor Greg Abbott has prioritised life-saving efforts, deploying more ...

item.title: CNN Anchor Calls Out Karoline Leavitt for Echoing Trump's Election Claims
item.description: CNN anchor Kasie Hunt challenged Trump press secretary Karoline Leavitt during a segment that highlighted the recurring nature of her comments about election security. Leavitt claimed President Donald...

item.title: Jayden Adams Memorial Service Held in Stellenbosch
item.description: The memorial service for Bafana Bafana star Jayden Adams is currently taking place at the Stellenbosch Town Hall. The 25-year-old football player's body was discovered at a property on Military Road, ...

item.title: Vodacom and Oakwood Host Corporate Golf Tournament to Boost Business Networking
item.description: Vodacom Tanzania PLC and Oakwood Holdings Limited are set to host the Vodacom Corporate Masters Golf Tournament on August 1 at the TPDF Lugalo Golf Club in Dar es Salaam. The event will bring together...

item.title: Smartphones are changing the way we communicate
item.description: The article explores how the widespread use of smartphones is diminishing spontaneous face-to-face interactions, particularly small talk. Author Garry Linnell argues that people are increasingly relyi...

item.title: Federal Government Faces Pressure to Criminalize Residential School Denialism as Hate Speech
item.description: Crown-Indigenous Relations Minister Rebecca Alty stated that Bill C-9, the Combatting Hate Act, did not include an analysis on whether residential school denialism should be classified as hate speech....

item.title: Key News: Middle East Crisis, Cash Aid, and Legal Developments
item.description: The article highlights critical updates from July 16, 2026, focusing on the Middle East crisis, where the Philippine government plans to provide cash aid to 7.5 million households affected by ongoing ...

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Results Declared: 11.21 Lakh Candidates Qualify, Check Scorecard Here
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has declared the NEET UG 2026 results, with 11.21 lakh candidates qualifying for medical admissions. The highest score of 715 out of 720 was achieved jointly by Aryan...

item.title: NTA revises NEET UG 2026 answer key, drops one Physics question and awards bonus marks
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the final answer key for the NEET UG 2026 examination, making two significant revisions to the Physics section. One question was entirely removed due to ...

item.title: Decapitated body discovered in Plateau refuse dump
item.description: A decomposing beheaded body was found in a refuse dump in Angwan Durun-Uwa, Barkin Ladi Local Government Area of Plateau State. Residents were shocked after the corpse, wrapped in a sack, was discover...

item.title: New York Mayor Faces Backlash Over Housing Policy Remarks at Press Conference
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams faced widespread criticism and social media backlash after a press conference where he allowed a housing advocate to claim that evictions constitute a form of violence. ...

item.title: Chloe Fineman Announces Departure from 'SNL' After Seven Seasons
item.description: Chloe Fineman, the comedian and actor known for her iconic impressions, has announced her departure from 'Saturday Night Live' after seven seasons. In a heartfelt Instagram post, Fineman expressed her...

item.title: Affordable Mason Jar Pitchers Help Home Brewers Make Cold Brew and Iced Drinks for Less
item.description: HuffPost highlights a discounted set of two 64-ounce Mason jar-style glass pitchers available on Amazon as an affordable option for making cold brew coffee, iced tea, and infused drinks at home. The p...

item.title: Readers reflect on Sam Neill's enduring legacy and iconic roles
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed actor known for his roles in films like Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, has been remembered by fans through heartfelt tributes that highlight his lasting impact. Readers sha...

item.title: First Nation Community Evacuates by Boat Amid Wildfire Destruction in Ontario
item.description: The Namaygoosisagagun First Nation, also known as Collins First Nation, faced a devastating wildfire that burned over 350,000 hectares in northwestern Ontario. With no time to prepare, community membe...

item.title: Pakistan's Concerns Over Involvement in US-Iran Conflict Amid Houthi Attacks on Saudi Arabia
item.description: The article discusses how attacks by Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthis on Saudi Arabia have heightened Pakistan's frustration with Iran, potentially drawing Islamabad into the escalating conflict between t...

item.title: Tanzanian man convicted of wife's murder and sentenced to death
item.description: Mr Elias Cravery has been found guilty of murdering his wife, Ms Jovitha Elias, and sentenced to death by hanging. The High Court in Bukoba Sub-Registry ruled that eyewitness accounts and circumstanti...

item.title: Ateneo de Manila University establishes scholarship funds to honor Divine Adili and Rene Baterbonia
item.description: Ateneo de Manila University has launched scholarship funds in recognition of the contributions of Divine Adili and Rene Baterbonia, two individuals whose legacy is being honored through this initiativ...

item.title: Court orders FRSC to stop enforcing road safety on state roads
item.description: A federal high court in Kano has ruled that the Federal Road Safety Commission (FRSC) doesn't have the power to enforce road safety laws on state and local government roads. The court declared that FR...

item.title: Climate Change Fuels Escalating Wildfire Crisis in North America
item.description: Wildfires across Canada and the United States have led to severe air quality issues, with cities like Toronto, New York, Detroit, and Minneapolis experiencing hazardous smoky conditions. The article h...
